instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: BerriAI LiteLLM
vulnerabilities.name: BerriAI LiteLLM SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: BerriAI LiteLLM contains a SQL injection vulnerability that allows an attacker to read data from the proxy's database and potentially modify it, leading to unauthorised access to the proxy and the credentials it manages.
vulnerabilities.short_description: BerriAI LiteLLM contains a SQL injection vulnerability that allows an attacker to read data from the proxy's...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
